message:
ui: rework theme lifecycle, keyboard shortcuts, analytics rendering, and persistence

Theme system overhaul:
- Remove forced dark-mode coercion at startup: the old `startup_preset()`
  helper always mapped Light→Dark, meaning users' persisted Light preference
  was silently ignored. Now `refresh_theme_config_from_data_dir` honours the
  persisted preset directly and derives `theme_dark` from it.
- `ThemeToggled` now cycles through all built-in presets (Dark → Light →
  Catppuccin → Dracula → Nord → High Contrast) via `preset.next()` instead
  of a binary dark/light toggle.
- Add `persist_theme_selection()` to write `theme.json` immediately when the
  user changes theme, so the choice survives restarts. The write is gated
  behind `#[cfg(not(test))]` to keep unit tests hermetic.
- `resolved_style_context` no longer clones+mutates the theme config to
  force Dark when the user chose Light; it passes the config as-is.
- Replace hardcoded `version: 1` in `ThemeEditorState::to_config()` with the
  `THEME_CONFIG_VERSION` constant for forward compatibility.

Keyboard shortcut changes:
- Drop Ctrl+M as a TOGGLE_SELECT binding. Many terminals encode Enter as
  Ctrl+M (and Ctrl+J), so the old binding silently consumed Enter presses.
  Ctrl+M and Ctrl+J now map to `DetailOpened` for correct Enter semantics.
  TOGGLE_SELECT is now solely `Ctrl+X`.
- Remap Ctrl+T and Alt+T/Alt+Shift+T from `ThemeToggled` to
  `ThemeEditorOpened`, leaving F2 as the only quick-cycle theme keybind.
- Update banner shortcuts from case-insensitive to Shift-only (U/N/S),
  preventing lowercase query input ("u", "s") from being hijacked when the
  update banner is visible.
- Add Alt+S (search mode) to the contextual results footer hints and global
  hint list so the lexical/semantic/hybrid cycle is discoverable.
- Reorder footer hints: when items are selected, Bulk (Alt+B) is promoted
  to position 2 ahead of Select; when nothing is selected, Select comes
  before Mode.

Analytics charts rendering fixes:
- Add `truncate_with_ellipsis()` helper and `display_width()` (char-count
  based) to prevent lines from overflowing narrow terminals. Applied to
  explorer header, annotation line, scatter header, breakdown tab bar,
  tools header/rows, plans header/rows, coverage progress bar, and daily
  sparkline label.
- `shorten_label()` now uses `.chars().count()` and `.chars().take(n)`
  instead of byte-indexing, fixing panics on multi-byte UTF-8 agent names.
- `heatmap_series_for_metric(Coverage)` now uses the pre-normalised
  `heatmap_days` data directly (scaled to 0–100%) instead of falling
  through to the generic `daily_tokens` placeholder path.
- Coverage table adapts column layout for terminals narrower than 48 cols.
- Tools table switches to a compact 5-column format below 56 cols and
  clamps the agent name column to 8–24 chars.
- X-axis label rendering skips overlapping labels by tracking
  `last_label_end`.
- Empty-data messages reworded from "Run 'cass analytics rebuild'" to
  passive phrasing ("cass is rebuilding automatically" / "for the current
  filters"), since auto-rebuild is now the default.
- `AnalyticsChartData` gains `auto_rebuilt: bool` and
  `auto_rebuild_error: Option<String>` fields for signalling rebuild status.

State persistence expansion:
- Persist analytics filter state (since_ms, until_ms, agents, workspaces,
  source_filter) in `PersistedState` / `PersistedStateFile`, so the
  analytics surface remembers its filters across restarts.
- `has_seen_help` is now tracked independently on `CassApp` (not derived
  solely from `help_pinned || show_help` at persist time), preventing the
  flag from flipping back to false after the user closes help.

Detail modal and focus management:
- Allow Copy/Paste/Editor actions (CopySnippet, CopyPath, CopyContent,
  OpenInEditor, OpenInNano, ViewRaw) to pass through the detail-modal
  message filter instead of being swallowed.
- Forward "/" typed in detail modal to `DetailFindToggled`.
- `ViewLoaded` now releases the saved-views focus trap when the modal was
  open.
- Source filter menu `QuitRequested` handler now calls
  `focus_manager.pop_trap()` to release the modal focus trap.
- Detail panel renders background blocks for both content and find areas
  to prevent bleed-through from underlying panes.

Command palette reordering:
- Move "Saved views" to the top of the default palette action list (was
  near bottom after "Reload index/view"). "Toggle theme" moves to second
  position after "Toggle density".

Help text updates:
- Update help sections: F2 described as "Cycle theme preset", shortcuts
  section lists all copy variants (Ctrl+C snippet / Ctrl+Y path /
  Ctrl+Shift+C content), Shift+F3 described as "clear agent filter",
  detail navigation adds Tab for tab cycling and { } / [ ] for message
  jumping, search refresh described as background operation.
- Add semantic model consent dialog overlay (`render_consent_overlay`)
  offering Download / Hash-fallback / Cancel options.

Help reference text:
- "{} theme: dark/light" → "{} cycle themes (Dark → Light → Catppuccin →
  Dracula → Nord → High Contrast)"
- "{} match mode: prefix (default)" → "{} match mode: standard (default)"
- "{} ranking" adds date-newest and date-oldest to the cycle description.
- "Dark/Light themes" → "Theme presets" in export feature list.

Search mode feedback:
- Cycling search mode now sets a status message showing the new mode and
  the shortcut to cycle again.
- Query submission and empty-query history recall now mark
  `dirty_since` so the persist timer picks up the change.

New tests:
- `heatmap_series_coverage_uses_normalized_heatmap_days`
- `tools_header_line_respects_requested_width`
- `tools_row_line_respects_requested_width`
- `breakdown_tabs_line_respects_requested_width`
- `shorten_label_handles_unicode_boundaries`
- `view_loaded_releases_saved_views_focus_trap_when_modal_was_open`
- `update_banner_does_not_hijack_lowercase_query_input`
- `source_filter_menu_quit_requested_closes_and_releases_trap`
- `detail_modal_allows_copy_shortcuts_to_reach_action_handlers`
- `contextual_footer_hints_results_include_search_mode_cycle`
- `help_seen_state_persists_after_help_closed`
- Updated: `event_mapping_ctrl_m_maps_to_selection_toggled` → removed
  (Ctrl+M now maps to DetailOpened)
- Updated: `event_mapping_alt_t_maps_to_theme_toggled` → removed
  (Alt+T now maps to ThemeEditorOpened)
- Updated: `state_loaded_always_defaults_to_dark_theme` and
  `refresh_theme_config_coerces_light_startup_to_dark` → removed
  (forced-dark coercion eliminated)
- Updated: `resolved_style_context_forces_dark_when_theme_config_requests_light` → removed
- Updated: `update_shortcuts_intercept_query_when_banner_visible` →
  renamed to `update_shortcuts_intercept_shifted_query_when_banner_visible`

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
